subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Your letter, written in the month of Jamad, was received, but owing to the multitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی نامه شما که در شهر جماد مرقوم نموده بودید رسید ولی از کثرت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
